basic_details.job_title: IIM Lucknow Academic Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Lucknow (IIM Lucknow)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Lucknow (IIM Lucknow) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 2 Academic Assistant Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their resume and documents to the official email address.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Post-Graduate Degree in Economics (with at least 60% marks or equivalent CGPA)
qualification.details: Post-Graduate Degree in Economics (with at least 60% marks or equivalent CGPA). A prior knowledge of operating statistical/econometric software is preferable.

salary_details.details: Rs. 40,000/- per month with HRA (as per norms)

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 03-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIM Lucknow Academic Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIM Lucknow Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.heading: IIM Lucknow Academic Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IIM Lucknow Academic Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 03-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIM Lucknow Academic Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Academic Assistant post at IIM Lucknow?
faq.answer: The last date to receive applications for the Academic Assistant post at IIM Lucknow is 03 July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Academic Assistant position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Post-Graduate Degree in Economics with at least 60% marks or an equivalent CGPA. Prior knowledge of statistical/econometric software is preferred.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Academic Assistant post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Academic Assistant post at IIM Lucknow.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Academic Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary of Rs. 40,000/- per month, along with HRA as per norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is via email. Candidates need to send their resume and documents to the official email address.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the Academic Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Academic Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Academic Assistant post will primarily involve shortlisting of applications.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The Academic Assistant position is a contractual job.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIM Lucknow located?
faq.answer: IIM Lucknow is located in Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 226013.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.
